questions.source_label: Chapter 6.2 / Olympiad Problems / Gemini 3.1 Pro / Q4
questions.text: The real number $t$ satisfies the inequality $\tan t + \cot t < 0$. If it is also known that $\sec t > \csc t$, determine the quadrant in which the terminal point of $t$ lies.

questions.text:

questions.text: A real number $t$ satisfies $\sin t + \cos t = \frac{1}{3}$. Determine the exact value of $\tan t + \cot t$.

questions.text: The function $v(t) = \sin\left(\frac{t}{a}\right) + \cos\left(\frac{t}{b}\right)$, where $a$ and $b$ are relatively prime positive integers, models the combined sound wave of two tuning forks.
